# hubspot_pipeline (Resource)

Manages a deal pipeline and its exclusively owned stages.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `label` (String)
- `object_type` (String)
- `stages` (Map of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stages))

### Optional

- `display_order` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
